summary: Completed testing of agent filter fix on Financial Overview page. The bug was in the backend - it was filtering deposits by 'created_by' instead of 'agent_id' field. Fix verified: Backend API (10 tests) and Frontend UI (4 tests) all PASSED.

details: Finance tab loads with All Agents filter - PASS (1400€ revenue, 1 approved, 1 pending)
Agent dropdown shows all agents including 'nicolo zennaro' - PASS
Selecting 'nicolo zennaro' filters correctly - PASS (1400€ revenue, 1 approved, 0 pending)
Clear Filters resets to All Agents view - PASS (1400€ revenue, 1 approved, 1 pending)

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: Agent filter on Financial Overview page was not working. When filtering by a specific agent (nicolo zennaro), it showed 0€ revenue and 0 deposits, but when 'All Agents' was selected, it correctly showed 1400€ with 1 approved deposit.
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Backend was filtering deposits by 'created_by' instead of 'agent_id' field in finance_routes.py
bug_fix_verification.fix_description: Changed deposit_query to use agent_id for both agent and team filters

critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly changes deposit_query from 'created_by' to 'agent_id' for agent filter
Team filter also correctly uses agent_id with $in operator for team members
Frontend correctly sends agent_id parameter to API
Clear Filters button properly resets to 'All Agents' view
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent filter bug on Financial Overview page is fixed and verified. The fix changed deposit_query in finance_routes.py to use agent_id instead of created_by. Test file at /app/tests/test_finance_agent_filter.py can be reused for regression testing. Nicolo Zennaro has 1 approved deposit of 1400€ in January 2026.
